title: helenium × clementii
intro: Helenium × clementii, also known as the Sneezeweed hybrid, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helenium × clementii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to treat colds, sore throats, and other respiratory ailments.
